pi_items.metadata_value: DataCo Smart Supply Chain Dataset (Real Enterprise Subset)
pi_items.source: Manual inspection of setup_task.sh shows 25 rows of hardcoded, synthetic data with 2024 dates and sequential ORD-XXXX IDs. The real DataCo dataset uses integers for IDs and dates up to 2018.
Task instructions and verifier.py (lines 53 and 69) explicitly require and check for these two sheets.
Verifier script strictly checks for the presence of IF and AND in Order_Data (lines 60-61) and COUNTIF in Department_Summary (line 76).

privileged_info_summary: The dataset is not a real enterprise subset of the DataCo dataset, but rather a synthetic, 25-row mock dataset generated entirely within setup_task.sh using 2024 dates and sequential IDs. The task requires the creation of two specific sheets (Order_Data and Department_Summary) and explicitly relies on IF, AND, and COUNTIF formulas, which the verifier strictly checks.
